scripts.start:bg: sh -c 'mkdir -p logs && nohup node src/server.js > logs/server.out 2>&1 & echo $! > .pid && echo Started PID $(cat .pid)'
scripts.dev:bg: sh -c 'mkdir -p logs && nohup DEBUG_AUTH=1 NODE_ENV=development node src/server.js > logs/server.out 2>&1 & echo $! > .pid && echo Started PID $(cat .pid)'
scripts.stop: sh -c 'if [ -f .pid ]; then kill -TERM $(cat .pid) && echo Stopping $(cat .pid) && rm -f .pid; else echo .pid not found; fi'
scripts.status: sh -c 'if [ -f .pid ]; then ps -p $(cat .pid) -o pid,ppid,etime,comm; else echo stopped; fi'
scripts.logs: sh -c 'test -f logs/server.out && tail -n 200 -f logs/server.out || echo no logs yet'
